sprint-057.name: Runtime Installer Registry
sprint-057.description: Adds institutional sprint registry metadata for remote/local installer execution.

sprint-058.name: User Risk Profile
sprint-058.description: Adds defensive bankroll-based user risk profile calculation.

sprint-059.name: Bankroll Safety Gate
sprint-059.description: Adds defensive stake validation against bankroll profile, stops, exposure and martingale limits.

sprint-060.name: Human Operator Messaging
sprint-060.description: Translates bankroll safety verdicts into calm operator-facing guidance.

sprint-061.name: Conscious Profit Mode
sprint-061.description: Adds profit protection mode that reduces exposure near target and locks at stop win.

sprint-062.name: Emotional Cooldown Guard
sprint-062.description: Adds behavioral cooldown guard for repeated losses and revenge-operation attempts.

sprint-062-1.name: Cooldown Runtime Adapter
sprint-062-1.description: Adds a cooldown command gate adapter compatible with the current RuntimeKernel shape.

sprint-063.name: Runtime Risk Decision Gateway
sprint-063.description: Composes bankroll safety, profit protection, cooldown and human guidance into a runtime risk decision gateway.

sprint-064.name: Risk Profile Persistence
sprint-064.description: Adds atomic JSON persistence for operator risk profile.

sprint-065.name: Operator Setup Wizard
sprint-065.description: Adds UI-agnostic setup wizard for creating and persisting operator risk profiles.

sprint-066.name: Bankroll HUD Integration
sprint-066.description: Adds operator-facing bankroll HUD snapshot composer for risk profile and runtime risk decisions.

sprint-067.name: Paper Ledger Full Wiring
sprint-067.description: Adds O(1) runtime paper ledger state service for balance, PNL, high water mark and drawdown.

sprint-068.name: Human Session Report
sprint-068.description: Adds human-readable session report composer for bankroll, discipline, drawdown and recommended actions.
